content.speakerText: Thanks so much! We'll call you when they're ready.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢！镜做好了我们打电话通知您。
content.explanation: 正确答案 'Appreciate it! See you Thursday!' 包含感谢和具体时间，符合场景中表达真诚告别和预约回访的语境。干扰项 'Okay, bye!' 过于简略，缺乏礼貌和具体信息；'No problem, I'll come tomorrow.' 与对方说的 'we'll call you' 矛盾；'I'll pay now.' 与上下文无关，因为付款已处理。

content.speakerText: Don't forget to bring your ID when you pick them up!
content.speakerTextCn: 取镜时别忘了带身份证！

options.text: Can I use my passport instead?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Got it, thanks again!' 是对重要提醒的简短确认+感谢，符合礼貌且高效的告别语境。干扰项 'I don't have an ID.' 否认事实，不合语境；'Can I use my passport instead?' 是提问而非确认，偏离回应要求；'I'll bring it next week.' 与 'when you pick them up' 时间冲突，逻辑错误。

content.speakerText: Thanks for your help today! I really appreciate it.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢您今天的帮助！我真的很感激。

options.text: You're welcome! Have a wonderful day!

content.explanation: 正确答案 'You're welcome! Have a wonderful day!' 是标准且温暖的告别回应，包含感谢回应和祝福语。干扰项 'Yeah, no big deal.' 过于随意，缺乏礼貌；'I'll see you tomorrow then.' 假设未来见面，但顾客已离开；'Do you need anything else?' 是服务性提问，不适合在顾客道谢后使用。
